name: geogebra-geometry
description: Generate verified GeoGebra construction files from geometry problem text, screenshots, or LaTeX.

interface.shortDescription: Build fast or research-grade geometry diagrams.
interface.longDescription: Turn geometry problem statements, screenshots, or LaTeX into importable GeoGebra .ggb files. Fast mode is the default for economical one-shot generation; strict mode adds deeper symbolic auditing and layout search. Both modes verify intended conclusions, round-trip the generated file, and export a preview.
defaultPrompt: Turn this geometry problem into a verified GeoGebra file in fast mode.
Run a strict misleading-relation audit on this geometry construction.
Read this geometry screenshot and generate a clean .ggb diagram.
Audit this construction for accidental collinearity or parallelism.
